name: Beer Cheese Soup
description: A Hugo's staple and one of the reasons people keep coming back.

name: Homemade French Fries
description: The classic side everyone talks about.

name: Grasshopper Crepes
description: An old-school Hugo's dessert worth saving room for.

name: The Traditional Hamburger
description: 100% black angus beef with lettuce, tomato, pickle, onion, mayonnaise, and mustard.

name: Cheeseburger
description: A basement burger essential, charbroiled and built the Hugo's way.

name: Macho Nachos
description: Cheddar, jalapeños, refried beans, salsa, sour cream, guacamole, and diced tomatoes.

name: Deep-Fried Potato Skins
description: Five skins with cheddar, crisp bacon, and ranch or sour cream.

name: Spinach & Artichoke Dip
description: Warm, rich, and built for the table.

name: Cheese Board
description: Choice of three cheeses served with French bread and fruit.

name: House Salad
description: Served with choice of homemade dressings.

name: Broccoli & Cheddar Cheese Crepes
description: Savory crepes with old-school basement charm.

name: Crepes Cannelloni
description: With Italian marinara sauce and parmesan cheese.

name: Chicken or Tuna Salad
description: Served on lettuce with cottage cheese and tomato.
